overall.description: A stationary shot from the video game Hogwarts Legacy showing the Great Hall's interior. A student in dark wizard robes walks from the background toward the camera, passing through the dimly lit gothic hall with stone walls, arched windows, and long wooden dining tables where other students sit, before exiting the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint from a seated position at a dining table, watching the hall

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking steadily toward the camera from the background

entered.detail: tall arched windows with multiple panes set in stone walls, providing dim natural light
grey stone block walls with vertical columns and architectural details
long dark wooden tables with benches, arranged in rows
grey stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
tall iron candle holders with multiple arms sitting on the tables

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static position in a dimly lit gothic great hall. In the background, tall arched windows allow faint daylight to enter. Long wooden dining tables with iron candelabras occupy the right side, where other students sit. A student in dark robes approaches from the left background, walking toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables

events.description: walking character passes closest to camera and begins exiting frame left

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary viewpoint as the approaching character passes by

notable_agents.action: student passing very close to camera and exiting to the left side of frame

segments.scene_description: The student continues approaching until filling the foreground, then passes the camera and exits left. The perspective emphasizes the scale of the hall as the character moves from mid-ground to extreme close-up before leaving the frame. The iron candelabras on the right become briefly occluded by the passing figure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective within a dimly lit gothic hall as a lone figure transitions from a distant silhouette to a close-up presence. It begins with a wide view of the Great Hall, where faint daylight filters through tall arched windows and students sit beside long wooden tables topped with iron candelabras. As a student in dark robes emerges from the left background, the camera captures their steady approach from the mid-ground toward the foreground. The figure gradually fills the frame, briefly occluding the candelabras on the right as they reach an extreme close-up. Finally, the student passes the camera and exits to the left, leaving the vast, silent scale of the stone hall once again empty.
